name: Prisync Competitor Price Tracking API
what_it_does: Competitor price tracking and monitoring platform with REST API — automatically tracking competitor product prices, availability, and promotions across e-commerce sites, providing historical price data, price position analysis, and repricing recommendations for e-commerce retailers.
use_cases: Querying competitor prices for specific products to inform dynamic repricing decisions
Pulling price history data for competitive pricing analysis and trend reporting
Automating product catalog sync with Prisync to track new SKU competitors
Integrating competitor price alerts with e-commerce platform for automated repricing
Querying price position data to understand market share and competitive standing
not_for: B2B SaaS competitive intelligence (Prisync is for product/retail price monitoring)
Marketplaces selling their own brand without competitor comparison
best_when: An e-commerce retailer selling branded or commodity products wants to systematically track competitor prices, monitor promotions, and make data-driven repricing decisions.
avoid_when: You sell private label products with no direct price competitors, operate in B2B with negotiated pricing, or need qualitative competitive intelligence.

auth.notes: API key from Prisync account. Passed as apikey query parameter or Authorization header. No OAuth2 or scopes. No webhooks — polling required for price updates. Domain is tracked per Prisync account configuration.

pricing.paid_tiers: Professional $59/month (100 products); Premium $129/month (1,000 products); Platinum $229/month (5,000 products); Enterprise custom
pricing.notes: Turkish company (Istanbul). Founded 2013. Bootstrapped. Used by 700+ retailers in 50+ countries. Price tracking update frequency: twice daily on Professional, hourly on higher plans. Product-count-based pricing. Shopify, WooCommerce, Magento integrations. Strong in fashion, electronics, and home goods verticals.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API v2 for products, competitors, prices, and batch imports. API key query parameter or header. Good documentation at developer portal. No webhooks — poll for daily price updates. Products must be configured in Prisync before price data is available. Price data freshness depends on plan tier.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: All price data reads fully idempotent. Product reads idempotent by ID. Competitor reads idempotent. Price history reads idempotent by date range.
known_agent_gotchas: No webhooks — implement polling scheduler for daily price update retrieval
Products must be added to Prisync catalog before competitor tracking begins
Price update frequency depends on plan tier (2x/day vs hourly)
API key in query parameter (apikey) — avoid logging request URLs with key
Competitor URL matching uses scraping — some sites may block or have delays

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant (EU company). EU data residency. API key in query parameter — avoid logging full URLs. Price data is business-sensitive competitive intelligence — restrict API key sharing. Turkish company with EU GDPR compliance focus.
